upasargachandrika.example_text: 'kintu raRaprakarzavigalatsadvIraramuRqotkaraprAlambapratikarmasamBftamahaM sampAdayizye muhaH' (kirAta0 vyA0) prAlambamfjulambi syAt kaRWAdityamaraH
'prAlambamutkfzya yaTAvakASaM ninAya sAcIkftacAruvaktraH' (raGu0 614) prAlambamfjulambi (mAlyam) ityamaraH lambanaM syAllalantikA svarREH prAlambikA iti cAmaraH
'sakftkftAparADasya tatrEva vilambataH' (BA0 SAM0 13925) vilambataH=vilambamAnasya=avatizWamAnasya
'tAM prANmuKIM tatra niveSya tanvIM kzaRaM vyalambanta puro nizaRRAH' (ku0 713) avAtizWanta prasaraM vyaramayan
'iti yAvatsa nfpatirvicikitsan vilambate' (kaTA0 45103) nADyavasyatItyAha
'kiM vilabyate tvaritaM taM praveSaya' (uttara0 1) kiM cirAyasa ityarTaH
'vIva vA antarAtmA pakzO lambate' (paYca0 brA0 14920) vilambate saMSrayate ADfto Bavati
'kva rAmaH Sayito rAtrO kva sTitaH kva vilambitaH' (goresiyo0 saM0 rA0 29313) vilambita uzitaH
'ciraM tu BavatA kAlo vyAkzepeRa vilambitaH' (hari0 25667) vilambito muDA yApitaH
'vilambitaPalEH kAlaM ninAya sa manoraTEH' (raGu0 133) vilambitaM vyAkziptaM PalaM yezAM tEH
'patitAM kiM nAma nAlambase' (sA0 da0) Alambase DArayati avazwaBnAsi
'tasya kavitA maccittamAlambate' (DUrttasamAgame) Alambate harati Avarjayati
'tanU romAYcamAlambate' romodgamaM SrayatItyarTaH
'aTAlambya DanU rAmaH' (Bawwi0 635) Alambya gfhItvA
'SoBante kiYcidAlambAH SAlayaH kanakapraBAH' (rA0 31617) kiYcidAlambAH kiYcinnatAH
'rAme salakzmaRe yAte sItAM SUnye yaTAsuKam nirAlambAM harizyAmi rAhuScandrapraBAmiva' (rA0 34028).. nirAlambAM nirASrayAm
'yamudDartuM pUzA vyavasita ivAlambitakaraH' (vikrama0 434) AlambitakaraH prasAritakaraH AyAmitahastaH
'pAdenEkena gagane dvitIyena ca BUtale tizWAmyullambitastAvad yAvattizWati BAskaraH' (mfcCa0 211).. ullambita UrDvaM lambitaH utTita UrDvakAyaH
'rAjadvAri sa cIrikAm…udalambayat' (kaTA0 51130)
'ullambya tarO kzipraM vaDakEravaSo hataH' (kaTA0 6453) UrDvaM lambayitvA
'tasminnullambitamftaH kopyekaH puruzaH sTitaH' (kaTA0 7548) ullambita udvaDya lambitaH
'sapteme vasavaH prAptAH sa ekaH parilambate' (hari0 )
'sakft kftAparADasya tatrEva parilambataH' (BA0 SAM0 13925) parilambato'vatizWamAnasya viSvAsaM kurvata iti nIlakaRWaH
